name: Xivarbitrage
description: Final Fantasy XIV market-board explorer for spotting cross-world and cross-data-centre price gaps. Uses Universalis market data and XIVAPI item metadata to surface DC disparities, bargain listings, item listings, and recent sale history.

name: Xivmitplan
description: Raid mitigation planner for Final Fantasy XIV parties. Build an 8-player roster, load encounter timelines, assign job-specific mitigation and healing cooldowns to mechanics, then validate cooldown conflicts before sharing or forking plans.

name: Xivflips
description: Mobile-first Final Fantasy XIV market flip tracker for logging purchases, listings, sales, watchlist targets, profit, ROI, and daily market snapshots sourced from the xivarbitrage API.
